title: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts Recruitment 2026, Apply Online -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. paragraphs: AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has issued a notification for the positions of Project Nurse, DEO and Senior Project Assistant. The recruitment drive comprises 03 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 03-06-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse, DEO, and More Posts Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
AIIMS Delhi Project Nurse, DEO and More Posts Recruitment 2026

rows: Minimum Second Class or equivalent CGPA for a four-year Nursing Course (B.Sc Nursing). Desirable: at least 2 years’ experience in Basic sciences or health sciences.
Graduation in any discipline with 5 years’ work experience in administration, finance, and accounts work. Desirable: Experience in web handling & social media for public awareness & Education.

Intermediate or 12th pass in science stream from a recognized institute and/or 2 years’ experience in EDP work in Government, Autonomous PSU or any other recognized organization. A speed test of not less than 15000 key depressions per hour through a speed test on a computer. Ability to communicate, read, write, and type in English. Ability to use Microsoft Excel, Word, and PowerPoint. Experience in health research, including data management and data monitoring.
